# minio_pool_rebalance_status (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "minio_pool_rebalance_status" "example" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `pools` (List of Object) Per-pool rebalance status details. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--pools))
- `status` (String) JSON-marshalled rebalance status response.

<a id="nestedatt--pools"></a>
### Nested Schema for `pools`

Read-Only:

- `id` (Number)
- `progress` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--pools--progress))
- `state` (String)
- `used` (Number)

<a id="nestedobjatt--pools--progress"></a>
### Nested Schema for `pools.progress`

Read-Only:

- `bucket` (String)
- `bytes` (String)
- `elapsed` (String)
- `eta` (String)
- `num_objects` (String)
- `num_versions` (String)
- `object` (String)
